description:
THANK YOU GUYS SO MUCH FOR THE APPRECIATION!!!

They don't know anything about the other toons! Explain who they are in chat if you're going to involve them, the AI should catch on.

This is a part of my unloved characters series! I dive into niche characters and Fandoms, to bring the freaks what they really want!

Part 4/? of my niche series
